MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE INC.'s Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants Ministry Of Taste Llc Dba Red Dog And Dba Fearless Coffee, and Four Ps Groups Llc.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE INC.'s unopposed for entry of court judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to the court a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
